name: @spec-kit/scripts
description: CLI tools for spec-kit context generation and memory management

scripts.check:ast: npx tsx evals/check-no-mcp-lib-imports-ast.ts && npx tsx evals/check-handler-cycles-ast.ts
scripts.check: npm run lint && npx tsx evals/check-no-mcp-lib-imports.ts && bash check-api-boundary.sh && npx tsx evals/check-architecture-boundaries.ts && npx tsx evals/check-allowlist-expiry.ts && npx tsx evals/check-source-dist-alignment.ts
